title: Systems Thinking
html: Stub. Yahir's recurring instinct to map a domain as a lattice of interactions before acting on it. Earliest evidence: hand-transcribing the Pokémon type chart at 16 (2018 12 24 normal neutral to everything). Later evidence: the rated "mindless boring tasks" matrix in 2024 05 13 things, the BroMenu product-spec test matrix in 2024 12 21 todos.
